title: python3.11 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.11.13-5.1.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference [Orabug: 36073032]

[3.11.13-5.1]
- Security fixes for CVE-2026-0865, CVE-2025-15366, CVE-2025-15367 and CVE-2026-1299
Resolves: RHEL-143104 RHEL-143167 RHEL-144890
